_comment: Curated Melaka issues. Every entry below passed an adversarial fact-check on 2026-07-11 (one hostile verifier per claim re-searching all load-bearing numbers, dates and names via multiple independent search results; direct page loads are proxy-blocked in the build sandbox, so corroboration is search-excerpt-based — hence CONFIRMED rather than VERIFIED). Corrections from that pass are applied in the wording. PARTLY_CONFIRMED = core holds but one leg is single-sourced (noted in the receipt). Every entry must keep at least one working source URL. Seat keys use the current Melaka DUN codes.

N.24.issue_bm: ADUN Bemban (Mohd Yadzil Yaakub) dipecat daripada Bersatu pada Feb 2026 — antara 17 ahli disingkir dalam pembersihan puak — dan kini duduk sebagai Bebas; gabungan yang memenangi kerusi ini pada 2021 sudah tidak wujud di sini
N.24.issue_en: Bemban's assemblyman (Mohd Yadzil Yaakub) was expelled from Bersatu in Feb 2026 — among 17 members purged in a factional sweep — and now sits as an Independent; the coalition that won this seat in 2021 no longer exists here
N.24.receipt_bm: Bernama/The Star (13 Feb 2026): 17 ahli dipecat Lembaga Disiplin Bersatu, termasuk Yadzil (Bemban). Majoriti 2021 hanya 328 undi dalam pertandingan LIMA penjuru (The Star, 20 Nov 2021).
N.24.receipt_en: Bernama/The Star (13 Feb 2026): 17 members expelled by Bersatu's Disciplinary Board, including Yadzil (Bemban). The 2021 majority was just 328 votes in a FIVE-cornered fight (The Star, 20 Nov 2021).

N.24.issue_bm: 26 daripada 106 lokasi berisiko banjir di Melaka berada di daerah Jasin — banjir Okt 2025 sekali lagi memindahkan keluarga di sini
N.24.issue_en: 26 of Melaka's 106 flood-risk locations are in Jasin district — the Oct 2025 floods displaced families here again
N.24.receipt_bm: 106 lokasi berisiko / 26 di Jasin: The Star & Bernama (11 Nov 2025, JBPM Melaka). Banjir Jasin Okt 2025: laporan AHA Centre (19 Okt 2025, 16 keluarga/51 orang dipindahkan) — satu sumber sahaja.
N.24.receipt_en: 106 risk locations / 26 in Jasin: The Star & Bernama (11 Nov 2025, Melaka Fire Dept). Oct 2025 Jasin flooding: AHA Centre report (19 Oct 2025, 16 families/51 people displaced) — single-sourced.

N.15.issue_bm: Pengundi Pengkalan Batu pernah melalui episod lompat parti: ADUN yang menang 2018 dipecat DAP pada Mac 2020 selepas menyokong kerajaan pro-PN, bertanding semula sebagai Bebas pada 2021 dan tewas teruk — majoriti 2021 di sini hanya 131 undi, keputusan paling rapat dilaporkan di Melaka (seterusnya: Duyong, 200 undi)
N.15.issue_en: Pengkalan Batu lived through the defection saga first-hand: its 2018 winner was sacked by DAP in March 2020 after backing the PN-aligned government, ran again as an independent in 2021 and was crushed — the 2021 majority here was 131 votes, the closest result reported in Melaka that election (next closest: Duyong, 200)
N.15.receipt_bm: The Star (10 Mac 2020): pemecatan Norhizam daripada DAP. Keputusan 2021: Kalsom Noordin (BN) 4,839 vs Danish Zainuddin (PH) 4,708 — majoriti 131; Norhizam (Bebas) 1,218 undi, tempat terakhir.
N.15.receipt_en: The Star (10 Mar 2020): Norhizam's sacking from DAP. 2021 result: Kalsom Noordin (BN) 4,839 vs Danish Zainuddin (PH) 4,708 — majority 131; Norhizam (independent) 1,218 votes, last place.

N.13.issue_bm: Paya Rumput ialah kawasan keluarga muda yang berkembang pesat — projek perumahan rakyat PRR bernilai RM80 juta (280 unit, Taman Paya Emas) diumumkan pada Feb 2026, tanda permintaan rumah mampu milik yang tinggi
N.13.issue_en: Paya Rumput is a fast-growing young-family belt — an RM80m, 280-unit PRR public-housing project at Taman Paya Emas was announced in Feb 2026, a marker of high affordable-housing demand
N.13.receipt_bm: Bernama (14 Feb 2026): PRR Paya Rumput RM80 juta, 280 unit di Taman Paya Emas, dana KPKT — diumumkan untuk dibangunkan (bukan sedang dibina).
N.13.receipt_en: Bernama (14 Feb 2026): RM80m PRR Paya Rumput, 280 units at Taman Paya Emas, KPKT-funded — announced to be built (not yet under construction).

N.14.issue_bm: Pembangunan pesisir Klebang bernilai RM600 juta (JV LBS Bina–Oriental, fasa pertama rancangan ~RM7 bilion dalam koridor SM-WEZ) berdepan bantahan nelayan yang kehilangan kawasan tangkapan akibat penambakan
N.14.issue_en: The RM600m Klebang waterfront development (LBS Bina–Oriental JV, first phases of a ~RM7b plan in the SM-WEZ corridor) faces pushback from fishermen losing their fishing grounds to reclamation
N.14.receipt_bm: Business Today (27 Okt 2025): JV RM600 juta fasa 1A/1B, 54.75 ekar, sebahagian pembangunan ~RM7 bilion. Kesan nelayan didokumentasi Macaranga & Sahabat Alam Malaysia.
N.14.receipt_en: Business Today (27 Oct 2025): RM600m JV for phases 1A/1B, 54.75 acres, part of a ~RM7b development. Fishermen impacts documented by Macaranga & Sahabat Alam Malaysia.

N.21.issue_bm: Duyong menyaksikan pergelutan terbuka BN–DAP tentang siapa patut bertanding di sini — sementara isu penduduk terbiar di tepi
N.21.issue_en: Duyong is watching an open BN–DAP tussle over who gets to contest the seat — while residents' issues sit on the sidelines
N.21.receipt_bm: Malaysia Gazette (13 Jul 2025): 'selagi hidup saya takkan serahkan' — Mohamad Hasan (Tok Mat, UMNO) mengenai Duyong. Majoriti 2021 tepat 200 undi (4,684 vs 4,484).
N.21.receipt_en: Malaysia Gazette (13 Jul 2025): 'as long as I live I won't hand it over' — Mohamad Hasan (Tok Mat, UMNO) on Duyong. The 2021 majority was exactly 200 votes (4,684 vs 4,484).

statewide.issue_bm: Politik Melaka runtuh sementara Melaka banjir. Kerajaan negeri tumbang DUA kali dalam beberapa tahun — 2018 melalui peralihan sokongan (2020), kemudian Okt 2021 apabila empat ADUN menarik sokongan, memaksa pilihan raya pergantian penggal yang menelan kos ~RM45 juta. Wakil yang anda undi keluar; anda yang bayar.
statewide.issue_en: Melaka's politics collapses while Melaka floods. The state government fell TWICE in a few years — the 2018 government toppled by defections (2020), then again in Oct 2021 when four assemblymen withdrew support, forcing a mid-term election that cost ~RM45 million. The reps you elected walked out; you paid the bill.
statewide.receipt_bm: The Star (3 Mac 2020): kerajaan PH Melaka tumbang selepas seorang ADUN DAP dan seorang ADUN PKR lompat ke pihak PN. NST/Malay Mail (Okt 2021): empat ADUN (Idris Haron, Nor Azman Hassan, Noor Effandi Ahmad, Norhizam) tarik sokongan; DUN dibubarkan 5 Okt. Jawapan parlimen (Mac 2022): PRN 20 Nov 2021 menelan RM45 juta (RM46 juta diperuntukkan); keluar mengundi 65.85%. Norhizam Hassan Baktee (Pengkalan Batu) terlibat dalam KEDUA-DUA keruntuhan.
statewide.receipt_en: The Star (3 Mar 2020): the PH Melaka government fell after one DAP and one PKR assemblyman defected to the PN side. NST/Malay Mail (Oct 2021): four assemblymen (Idris Haron, Nor Azman Hassan, Noor Effandi Ahmad, Norhizam) withdrew support; the assembly was dissolved 5 Oct. Parliamentary reply (Mar 2022): the 20 Nov 2021 snap election cost RM45m (RM46m allocated); turnout 65.85%. Norhizam Hassan Baktee (Pengkalan Batu) was in BOTH collapses.

statewide.issue_bm: Kawasan yang sama banjir setiap musim tengkujuh — 106 lokasi berisiko banjir dikenal pasti di Melaka pada Nov 2025, 26 daripadanya di Jasin sahaja. Jasin banjir DUA kali pada 2025 (Mac dan Okt). Persediaan negeri: bot, 4WD, penjana — merancang SEKITAR banjir, bukan menghentikannya. Simpanan air Melaka pula hanya ~5.2%, antara paling nipis di negara.
statewide.issue_en: The same areas flood every monsoon — 106 flood-risk locations identified in Melaka in Nov 2025, 26 of them in Jasin alone. Jasin flooded TWICE in 2025 (March and October). The state's readiness: boats, 4WDs, generators — planning AROUND floods, not stopping them. And Melaka's water reserve margin is just ~5.2%, among the thinnest in the country.
statewide.receipt_bm: The Star & Bernama (11 Nov 2025, JBPM Melaka): 106 lokasi berisiko banjir — 53 Melaka Tengah, 27 Alor Gajah, 26 Jasin. Malay Mail/Bernama/NADMA (7 Mac 2025): mangsa banjir memuncak 330, Jasin 264. AHA Centre (19 Okt 2025): Jasin banjir lagi — 16 keluarga/51 orang dipindahkan (satu sumber sahaja). The Edge/BIMB Securities (2025): margin simpanan air Melaka 5.2%, bawah paras disyorkan SPAN 10-15%.
statewide.receipt_en: The Star & Bernama (11 Nov 2025, Melaka Fire Dept): 106 flood-risk locations — 53 Melaka Tengah, 27 Alor Gajah, 26 Jasin. Malay Mail/Bernama/NADMA (7 Mar 2025): flood victims peaked at 330, Jasin 264. AHA Centre (19 Oct 2025): Jasin flooded again — 16 families/51 people displaced (single-sourced). The Edge/BIMB Securities (2025): Melaka's water reserve margin 5.2%, below SPAN's recommended 10-15%.
